summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P1 Admin User Management feature. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed including admin CRUD operations, non-admin access restrictions, and UI components.

design_issues.issue: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent
Console warning: Chart width/height -1 on initial render (Recharts)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/users - list users as admin (200)
Backend: POST /api/admin/users - create user as admin (200)
Backend: PATCH /api/admin/users/{id} - update user as admin (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} - delete user as admin (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} - cannot delete self returns 400
Backend: Auth endpoints (login admin, login user, get me)
Frontend: Usuarios nav link visible for admin
Frontend: Usuarios page loads with user table
Frontend: Create user dialog opens and creates user
Frontend: Delete user works with confirmation
Frontend: Non-admin - Usuarios nav link NOT visible
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby - add DialogDescription component for accessibility
Minor: Recharts chart shows -1 width/height warning on initial render - consider adding minWidth/minHeight
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing were cleaned up. Existing users: admin@santa-gadea.es, secretaria@santa-gadea.es, nuevo@santa-gadea.es
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Admin User Management feature fully tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_admin_users.py cover all CRUD operations and access control. Frontend Usuarios page at /usuarios works correctly for admin users. Non-admin users see 'Acceso restringido' and don't see the nav link.
